description: A new enterprise client requested real-time support inside the Socioboard web application. Integrate the third-party HelpDesk live chat widget snippet from /home/ga/widget_code.html into the global layout Blade templates within /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/resources/views/ so that the widget appears on all pages. Ensure the application cache is cleared in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-web-php/ and verify that the widget code is present in the HTML source at http://localhost/ without breaking the application structure.
